groups.label: Overview and self-host
groups.description: Guidance, self-host inspection, live-only control-plane actions, and permission planning.

groups.label: Workspace registry
groups.description: Workspace discovery, registration, and active repo context management.

groups.label: Repository read
groups.description: Manifest-first repository navigation, summary/chunk file access, trees, search, issues, PRs, and workflow run read APIs.

groups.label: Repository write
groups.description: Branch creation, single-file and batch file edits including .github/workflows, PR creation and merge, comments, and workflow dispatch.

groups.label: Collaboration and cleanup
groups.description: Reviewer context preparation plus branch cleanup discovery and execution under repo guardrails.

groups.label: Verification
groups.description: Standard capability-aware verification suites, run comparison, and workflow log access.

groups.label: Preview environments
groups.description: Preview URL resolution, health probing, teardown, and queue-linked preview state.

groups.label: Browser automation
groups.description: Session-based browser validation layered on the existing gui capture workflow and diagnostics artifacts.

groups.label: Desktop packaging
groups.description: Desktop build, smoke, and packaging artifact retrieval for Electron/Tauri style projects.

groups.label: API and backend
groups.description: API contract discovery, lightweight validation, and live request execution against previews or app URLs.

groups.label: Database
groups.description: Schema inspection plus workflow-backed migration, seed, reset, and safe query operations.

groups.label: Runtime observability
groups.description: Workflow log querying, error clustering, and incident bundle assembly for debugging loops.

groups.label: Release and deploy
groups.description: Promotion, rollback, release readiness, and deploy health evaluation.

groups.label: Queue and review loop
groups.description: Persistent job tracking, audit history, reviewer actions, and queue-driven state transitions.

permissionPresets.label: Repo review and investigation
permissionPresets.description: Inspect repository state, open PRs, workflow runs, and queue state without mutating code.

permissionPresets.label: Implementation with PR
permissionPresets.description: Read repo state, create branches, edit files, open PRs, and track queue progress.

permissionPresets.label: Implementation with workflow dispatch
permissionPresets.description: Implementation, workflow-file edits, allowlisted workflow dispatch, and queue tracking.

permissionPresets.label: Desktop fullstack control plane
permissionPresets.description: End-to-end GUI implementation with verification, preview, browser, desktop, backend, database, observability, and release controls.

permissionPresets.label: Review follow-up
permissionPresets.description: Respond to review findings, update PR state, and track reviewer/worker handoff.

permissionPresets.label: Maintainer cleanup
permissionPresets.description: Inspect open PRs, active jobs, and remove safe stale agent branches.

permissionPresets.label: Self maintenance and deploy
permissionPresets.description: Inspect self-host state from any environment, but allow secret sync and live promotion only from the live self-host worker.
